name: Ingebrigtsen weekly (time-based)
goal: repeating weekly template - length set by the program dates in config.json
template: The Ingebrigtsen double-threshold week converted from distance to time (the minutes the source athletes spend, not their km): 10km easy -> 45min, 20km long -> 90min, 10x1000m -> 10x3min, 5x2km -> 5x6min, 25x400m -> 25x66s, 20x219m hill -> 20x35s. Strength/core/gym sessions from the source are omitted. Every week is identical - edit days in the GUI to scale it down; edits live in plans/overrides.json.
notes: Lactate targets mapped to percent-of-10k-pace: 2.5 mmol -> 91-93% (sub-threshold), 3.5 mmol -> 95-97% (threshold), hills ~8 mmol -> hard by feel
As written this is the full elite week (~10 sessions, ~7.5 h, ~88 km at current paces) - drop PM sessions first when trimming
Threshold discipline is the whole point: 91-97% should feel controlled, never a race

Specific phase (amber, final 6 weeks before the race): keep the sub-threshold base but convert one threshold session per week to race-pace work - stepping stones every 10-14 days (e.g. 4-5x2km @ 100% w/ 3min jog, 8x1km @ 100%), final big session 10-14 days out with >=8km of work at 100% (Bakken/Almgren/Ingebrigtsen practice + knowledge base)
Race week (green): cut volume roughly in half, keep 2-3 short touches of race pace early in the week, very easy + strides the last 2 days
km figures per day are rough estimates at current paces, used only for the done-mark

tue.workout: AM: wu, 5x6min @ 91-93% w/ 1min jog, cd; PM: wu, 10x3min @ 95-97% w/ 1min jog, cd

thu.workout: AM: wu, 5x6min @ 91-93% w/ 1min jog, cd; PM: wu, 25x66s @ 95-97% w/ 30s jog, cd

sat.workout: AM: wu, 20x35s hill sprints w/ 70s jog, cd; PM: 45min easy
